zh.lifeSummary: 當Aed Heth I Mormaer Of Moray於1050年出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親King MacBethad MacFinlay11047歲，母親Mi Lulach11047歲。他和Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland至少有7個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1116年在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aed Heth I Mormaer Of Moray于1050年出生在苏格兰时，他的父亲King MacBethad MacFinlay11047岁，母亲Mi Lulach11047岁。他和Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland至少有7个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1116年在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Heth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: from an early Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal nameAed, meaning ‘fire’.

nameMeanings.name: Aed
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Aed Heth I Mormaer Of Moray was born in 1050, in Scotland, his father, King MacBethad MacFinlay, was 11047 and his mother, Mi Lulach, was 11047. He had at least 7 sons and 1 daughter with Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland. He died in 1116, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aed Heth I Mormaer Of Moray est né en 1050, à Écosse, son père, King MacBethad MacFinlay, avait 11047 ans et sa mère, Mi Lulach, avait 11047 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille avec Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland. Il est décédé en 1116, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aed Heth I Mormaer Of Moray 1050 in Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater King MacBethad MacFinlay 11047 und seine Mutter Mi Lulach 11047. Er hatte mit Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1116 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aed Heth I Mormaer Of Moray è nato il nel 1050 nel Scotland, il suo padre, King MacBethad MacFinlay, aveva 11047 anni e il suo madre, Mi Lulach, aveva 11047 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia con Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland. Morì nel 1116, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Aed Heth I Mormaer Of Morayが1050年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父King MacBethad MacFinlayは11047歳，母Mi Lulachは11047歳であった。彼はTul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotlandとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1116年に故郷で66歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Aed Heth I Mormaer Of Moray(이)가 1050년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King MacBethad MacFinlay(은)는 11047세였고, 그의 어머니 Mi Lulach(은)는 11047세였다. 그는 Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1116년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Methil, Fifeshire, Scotland: Methil, Fib, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aed Heth I Mormaer Of Moray nasceu em 1050, em Scotland, seu pai, King MacBethad MacFinlay, tinha 11047 anos e sua mãe, Mi Lulach, tinha 11047 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha com Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland. Ele faleceu em 1116, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aed Heth I Mormaer Of Moray родился в 1050 г. в местности Шотландия, его отцу по имени King MacBethad MacFinlay было 11047 лет, а матери, которую звали Mi Lulach, 11047. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь от Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland. Он умер в 1116 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aed Heth I Mormaer Of Moray nació en 1050, en Scotland, su papá, King MacBethad MacFinlay, tenía 11047 años y su mamá, Mi Lulach, tenía 11047 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija con Tul or Orlin MacDuff, Princess of Scotland. Murió en 1116, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
